creator: joe@rewt.org.uk
text:
Post 254024 the vmem changes cause both SMP and USB to hang during boot - thread here: http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-mips/2013-August/002975.html

In summary:

* 254025 with SMP enabled (coremask=0x3) the kernel hangs after ULE setup
* 254025 with SMP disabled the kernel hangs after beginning USB setup:

usbus0: 480Mbps High Speed USB v2.0 (sometimes followed by another line/device eg lo0: bpf attached)
